div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Argentina (Armour)
div.p:
322. In view of Prebisch’sRaúl Prebisch, General Manager of the Banco Central de la República Argentina. statement that the Argentine Government would block the proceeds of funds resulting from the purchase of French ships in Argentina, as reported in the inclosure to your despatch no. 4199, February 20,Despatch No. 4199 not printed, but for memorandum of February 20, by the Second Secretary of Embassy in Argentina, enclosed in the despatch, see p. 455. the Department suggests that if you perceive no objection, you endeavor to persuade the authorities to
block the proceeds should Argentina purchase planes and spare parts from Air France.
